job_requirements.raw_text: Need a skilled mason for plastering a building in central Delhi, near Connaught Place.
Need an electrician for wiring installation in Noida Sector 62.
Looking for home cleaning and domestic help in Dwarka.
Urgent plumbing repair needed for leaky pipes in Gurugram Phase 3.
Need a plumber in Connaught Place area to fix hotel kitchen pipes.

ratings.comment: Ramesh was on time, skilled, and did excellent plastering.
Great contractor, paid promptly through UPI.
Very professional wiring work. Clean and safe.
Highly reliable, punctual, and cleans very thoroughly.
Fixed the leaks quickly, good plumber.
Deepak arrived 4 hours late, did not complete the job, and left the water valve open causing leakage!

endorsements.comment: Ramesh Prasad is my go-to mason. He worked with me for 6 months on a residential project.
Amit is a highly certified wireman. Extremely safe and reliable.

{"reason":"Reciprocal 5-star ratings exchanged in 3 jobs lasting less than 2 hours each","contractor_id":"ccec457c-5bbe-4bdd-8b54-ce92ebcaee69","ratings_count":3}

disputes.reason: Contractor refuses to pay. I worked for 3 hours and fixed the main pipeline. The leakage was from a different pipe that was not in my scope.
